The three stars, Svati, Visakha and Anuradha, constitute the
fourth circle. This produces the sense of security in the minds of
people, promotes the interests of Brahmins and K§atriyas as well
as excellent growth of crops, but causes estrangement among
friends. Should Venus be assailed in this circle by another planet,
he would kill the chieftain of the KirStas (hunters), and crush the
Iksvakus, cave-men, people of Avantl, Pulindas, TaAganas and
Surasenas,

The fifth Mandala consists of the five stars, Jye§tha, Mala,
Purva and Uttara Asadha, and Sravana. This will trouble people
.with hunger, thieves and diseases and afflict the people of Kashmir,

Asmara, Matsya, Avanti and those living on the banks of the
